title: Pretty Ladders
description: Pretty Ladders adds ladders with 3D Models representing each type of planks, logs and stripped logs.
body:
# Pretty Ladders

This really simple mod adds **27 ladders** to the game with 3D Models - The idea is to have ladders that represent each type of planks, logs and stripped logs.

![PrettyLadders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aO4jFwwq/images/ac5bf1cf59aa12544ea08af6bd37f08b715a09b7.png)

![PrettyLadders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aO4jFwwq/images/78bcc38b3d1b1780b2fabc5e4c659eec6e291528.png)

![PrettyLadders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aO4jFwwq/images/4765fed8edad127ce9aa6556db401e4e37942bc4.png)

![PrettyLadders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aO4jFwwq/images/cce2e4e8b2275660a8d0ebdbd4b744dbbc21ad4f.png)

The ladders are cosmetic, in the sense that they behave exactly like Minecraft ladders, the main difference is that they are 3 times "stronger" than Vanilla Minecraft ones.
